field_occurrences.description: The time column for the visualization. Note that you can define arbitrary expression that return a DATETIME column in the table.

original_field.description: The time column for the visualization. Note that you can define arbitrary expression that return a DATETIME column in the table.
original_field.notes: 共享控件源自 `dndGranularitySqlaControl`，`clearable=false`、`canDelete=false`。`BaseViz.query_obj()` 直接读取 root `granularity_sqla`。`extra_form_data.granularity_sqla` 在 legacy merge 路径里会写到 `form_data.granularity`，而不是 `granularity_sqla`，因此第三方 embedding 下不应把它当成高置信动态覆盖入口。

field_occurrences.description: This control filters the whole chart based on the selected time range.

original_field.description: This control filters the whole chart based on the selected time range.
original_field.enum_source: relative time expressions + absolute ISO 8601 ranges
original_field.notes: 共享控件类型是 `DateFilterControl`，`freeForm=true`。源码说明相对时间表达式由服务端按本地时区解析。`BaseViz.query_obj()` 直接读取 root `time_range`，因此它是 Horizon 在 embedding 场景下相对高置信的动态覆盖字段。

field_occurrences.description: Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.

original_field.description: Select one or many metrics to display. You can use an aggregation function on a column or write custom SQL to create a metric.
original_field.notes: 共享控件源自 `dndAdhocMetricsControl`，带 `validateNonEmpty`。`NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj()` 在 `timeseries_limit_metric` 未设置时，会用第一个 metric 作为排序依据。

field_occurrences.description: 字段标签为 Filters。legacy explore_json 路径会先把 legacy filters 转成 adhoc_filters，再继续处理 extra filters / extra_form_data。

original_field.description: 字段标签为 Filters。legacy explore_json 路径会先把 legacy filters 转成 adhoc_filters，再继续处理 extra filters / extra_form_data。
original_field.enum_source: datasource filterable columns + saved metrics + 当前 metrics
original_field.notes: `dndAdhocFilterControl` 会把当前 `metrics` 作为 `selectedMetrics` 传给筛选控件上下文。对于第三方 embedding，追加筛选应优先走 `extra_form_data.adhoc_filters` 或 `extra_form_data.filters`，不要直接重写保存态根字段。

field_occurrences.description: Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data.

original_field.description: Dimensions contain qualitative values such as names, dates, or geographical data. Use dimensions to categorize, segment, and reveal the details in your data.
original_field.enum_source: datasource columns；若 dataset metadata 含 `groupby=true`，共享控件会优先只暴露可 groupby 的列
original_field.notes: 共享控件源自 `dndGroupByControl`，默认 `multi=true`。`groupby` 为空时，图表仍可按 metric 维度生成一行或多行；`groupby` 非空时，series key 会携带维度值，并在只有一个 metric 时省略 metric 前缀。

field_occurrences.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed.

original_field.description: Limits the number of series that get displayed.
original_field.notes: 共享控件标签是 `Series limit`，`freeForm=true`，带整数校验。`BaseViz.query_obj()` 会把它转成 `query_obj['timeseries_limit']`。它限制的是 series 数，而不是底层 SQL 返回的总行数。

field_occurrences.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).

original_field.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
original_field.notes: 共享控件源自 `dndSortByControl`。若显式设置且该 metric 不在 `metrics` 中，`NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj()` 会先把它 append 到 `query_obj['metrics']`，然后再生成 `orderby`。

field_occurrences.description: If enabled, this control sorts the results/values descending, otherwise it sorts the results ascending.

original_field.description: If enabled, this control sorts the results/values descending, otherwise it sorts the results ascending.
original_field.notes: 共享控件默认只在 `timeseries_limit_metric` 有值时显示，但 `NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj()` 在 fallback 到第一个 metric 排序时仍然会读取这个标志。也就是说，即使 UI 上隐藏了它，API root form_data 里它仍然会影响 `orderby` 的方向。

field_occurrences.description: Compute the contribution to the total

original_field.description: Compute the contribution to the total
original_field.notes: 这是 Horizon 自己在 controlPanel 中定义的 Checkbox。真实后端语义不是跨时间累计，而是 `NVD3TimeSeriesViz.process_data()` 在每个时间点把各 series 值按该时间点总和归一化。

field_occurrences.description: Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.

original_field.description: Limits the number of the rows that are computed in the query that is the source of the data used for this chart.
original_field.notes: 共享控件带整数校验与最大行数校验。`row_limit` 作用于底层查询返回的原始行数，和 `limit` 控制的 series 截断不是一回事。

original_field.description: Pixel height of each series
original_field.notes: 这是 Horizon 自己定义的 `SelectControl`，`freeForm=true`。`transformProps.js` 会执行 `parseInt(seriesHeight, 10)`，然后把结果传给 `HorizonChart` 的 `seriesHeight`。因此 API root 最稳妥的写法是传数字字符串或整数。

field_occurrences.description: series: Treat each series independently; overall: All series use the same scale; change: Show changes compared to the first data point in each series

original_field.description: series: Treat each series independently; overall: All series use the same scale; change: Show changes compared to the first data point in each series
original_field.notes: `series` 表示每一行独立缩放；`overall` 会在 `HorizonChart.jsx` 中先聚合所有点并计算一个全局 `yDomain`；`change` 会在 `HorizonRow.jsx` 中把每个点改写为 `y - first_point_y` 后再绘制。

occurrences.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).

original_field.description: Orders the query result that generates the source data for this chart. If a series or row limit is reached, this determines what data are truncated. If undefined, defaults to the first metric (where appropriate).
original_field.notes: 共享控件源自 `dndSortByControl`。若显式设置且该 metric 不在 `metrics` 中，`NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj()` 会先把它 append 到 `query_obj['metrics']`，然后再生成 `orderby`。

notes: Horizon 位于 `legacy-plugin-chart-horizon` 插件中，metadata 明确声明 `useLegacyApi=true`，因此前端真实请求路径是 `/superset/explore_json/`，不是 `/api/v1/chart/data`。
Horizon 没有专属前端 `buildQuery`。`ChartClient.ts` 在 `useLegacyApi=true` 且未注册 buildQuery 时，会把原始 root form_data 直接包装进 `{ form_data: ... }`。
`getFormDataFromControls.ts` 会按 control name 原样写入 root form_data，所以 API 根层必须使用 `granularity_sqla`、`time_range`、`metrics`、`groupby`、`series_height`、`horizon_color_scale` 这些 snake_case 键。
该图的 controlPanel 只有三个 section：`Time`、`Query`、`Chart Options`。没有注释、预测或高级分析专用 section。

`BaseViz.query_obj()` 读取 `granularity_sqla`、`time_range`、`limit`、`timeseries_limit_metric`、`row_limit`、`order_desc`；随后 `NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj()` 用 `timeseries_limit_metric` 或第一个 metric 生成 `orderby`。
`NVD3TimeSeriesViz.process_data()` 在 `contribution=true` 时执行 `(df.T / dft.sum()).T`，即按每个时间点横向归一化到总和。
`transformProps.js` 和 `HorizonChart.jsx` 运行时消费的是 camelCase alias `seriesHeight`、`horizonColorScale`，并把 `horizon_color_scale='overall'` 解释为全图共享 y 轴域、`'change'` 解释为相对每条序列首点的变化值。这些都不是 API root 键。

legacy_api_behavior.query_builder: Horizon 没有专属前端 buildQuery。ChartClient.ts 在 `useLegacyApi=true` 且未注册 buildQuery 时，会把原始 form_data 直接包装进 legacy payload。

query_compilation.base_query: BaseViz.query_obj() 先构造 timeseries query_obj，并把 root `limit` 写成 `query_obj['timeseries_limit']`，把 root `row_limit` 写成 `query_obj['row_limit']`。
query_compilation.time_range: `get_since_until()` 直接读取 root `time_range` / `since` / `until` 计算 `from_dttm` 与 `to_dttm`。
query_compilation.metrics: `metrics` 由 `self.all_metrics` 编译进 `query_obj['metrics']`；Horizon controlPanel 暴露的是多值 `metrics`，不是单值 `metric`。
query_compilation.groupby: `groupby` 为可选数组维度。若存在，会参与 pivot；若为空，图表仍可按 metric 维度输出单行或多 metric 行。
query_compilation.orderby: `NVD3TimeSeriesViz.query_obj()` 令 `sort_by = form_data.timeseries_limit_metric || first_metric`，并写入 `query_obj['orderby'] = [(sort_by, not order_desc)]`；若排序 metric 不在 `metrics` 中，会先 append。
query_compilation.contribution: `NVD3TimeSeriesViz.process_data()` 在 pivot 后按每个时间点把各 series 值除以该时间点总和。
query_compilation.returned_data: `NVD3TimeSeriesViz.get_data()` 输出 `[{ key, values, classed? }]`；`sort_series=false` 时，最终按 `tuple(x['key'])` 排序。

Time.description: The time column for the visualization. Note that you can define arbitrary expression that return a DATETIME column in the table.
